title: Garden Awakens +
description: A mod that expands the minecraft garden awakens update (1.21.4)
body:
Do you think the 1.21.4 Garden Awakens update didn't add enough, Well this mod is for you!
 
In this mod we plan to expand on Minecraft 1.21.4 with features players wanted as well as features that just fit the update
 
The First update comes with a new Structure (Creaking Cave), A Friendly Creaking, The Ability to Click resin on Wood to make petrified wood & 3 New Flowers for the Pale Garden Biome

The Second update adds 3 new mobs (Pale Creeper, Ancient Sprite, Pale Eye), it also makes a lot of changes to V1 Features
